channel.title: PNallDR
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from PNallDR, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Secretary of State provides update on significant progress in Iran peace negotiations
Posobiec on Newsmax: Left fostering 'assassination culture'
item.description: Jack Posobiec, a Turning Point USA contributor and former Navy intelligence officer, stated on Newsmax that left-wing rhetoric against the president...

item.title: Watch: Platner further embarrasses himself when challenged on latest offensive remark
Hassett: No economic warning signs on the horizon
item.description: White House National Economic Council Director Kevin Hassett dismissed concerns about emerging warning signs in the U.S. economy on Sunday, despite...
